Careers with Fisher Heights Chiropractic Clinic

Do you want to be part of the Fisher Heights Chiropractic Clinic healthcare team?
Do you love your profession and continuous learning?
Do you believe in the collaborative care model?
Do you enjoy new challenges, hard work and service to others?

If you answered YES to these questions, you may be a good fit to our team. We are currently seeking a registered massage therapist. Please send your cover letter and email as follows:

Eleanor Bourgaize – info@fisherheightschiro.com

What we offer:
Promotion through our high-ranking website, newsletter and access to our extensive client base.
Support from our team, many with years of experience from which to learn.
Furnished rooms
WiFi
Online booking (JaneApp)
Linens
